newsSince: No genuinely new fundamental order data since June 9. The +16% two-week move was driven by analyst target hikes (B. Riley raised to $355, Oppenheimer to $370) and continued AI/advanced-packaging enthusiasm. The $240M+ HBM volume purchase agreement was announced Feb 2026 and the Dragonfly G5 HBM4 selection / June shipments were disclosed in April, so both predate the window.

sources.label: How the ONTO story is shifting as analysts lift targets (Yahoo Finance)
Onto Innovation launches Dragonfly G5 inspection system (Investor Relations)

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: WFE leverage to HBM4/advanced-packaging capacity intact, but the +16% move is target-hike sentiment, not new order timing. Prior case already cut 10->13 for the rerating; no fresh order evidence to move again. Price penalty applied separately. Hold 13.
verdicts.bull: Levered to AI-driven fab + HBM4 capacity; Dragonfly G5 / 3Di committed double-digit orders.
verdicts.neutral: Strong franchise but move is target-driven, not new bookings; expectations elevated.
verdicts.bear: Upside hinges on order timing and export-control risk into a high-expectation print.

verdicts.rankRationale: Co-packaged-optics/residual-alpha lens: a further +16% on analyst target sweeps (B.Riley $355, Oppenheimer $370) with no new evidence pushes price near targets, so the once-hidden advanced-packaging process-control story keeps de-hiding. Residual alpha shrinks further vs peers; soft fundamental tick down.
verdicts.bull: Advanced-packaging process control is a genuine CPO/AI-interconnect chokepoint.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but increasingly consensus; alpha is being arbitraged away.
verdicts.bear: Crowded; price now near median targets on no new evidence, thin residual alpha.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding; capex cycle and high expectations

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: upstream metrology/inspection pick-and-shovel thesis is intact and execution confirmed, but the move is target-driven sentiment, not new fundamentals. Nothing new since June 9 to move rank either way; price rerating handled separately. Hold 31.
verdicts.bull: Scarce process-control exposure to leading-edge + advanced-packaging capacity.
verdicts.neutral: Execution good; valuation re-rated on 30%+ growth narrative.
verdicts.bear: Metrology/inspection pricing and capex-cycle execution risk.
